TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Atayal Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://tay.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: wagi' qaniy hya' ga lalu' na cyux maku' kya babaw na kayal, nanu' yasa qu mutuw msaysyuw mhtuw babaw kayal mwah psyax ita' squliq babaw rhzyal qaniy. nma' ini' kzyan na wagi' kin mkilux ru kinsmyax ga, kya qutux pintkaykay' na kinbkaysan sraral. sraral sraral balay mga, minsazing qu wagi' niya' hma, yalaw gi sazing qu wagi' niya' ru yasa siy psaysyuw mhtuw babaw kayal mru, yasa siy kqlyan krayryax , ru yasa siy kkilux krayryax qu kayal niya' ma, maymaw ini' bqbaqiy na squliq maha qaynu' qu hhngawan m'abi' na squliq, ru qaynu' qu pptzyuwagan, yalaw gi yasa siy kkilux krayryax ru ana kwara' qqhuniq uziy lga, wal siy 'ngaygyut mkzyay' lru ana ka tnubux naha' uziy lga, ini' gbku' uziy la. nanu' yasa qu mkayal kwara' qu nnbkos maha, aki' hmswa' twanay ta' sa mtlaylawkah na mrkyas musa' smbu' na pnayluq, kuna yasa la blaq cikay! nanu' swazyaw naha' sa cyugal mtlaylawkah na mrkyas musa' smbu' squ wagi' qasa. nanu' wayal balay qu cyugal hi' qasa, ruw ki'a balay pira' kinbsyaq 'nusa' naha' lga, nya mbzinah qalang lawzi lma, ana ga taqu 'nyal qasa lmga, nyuw siy 'n'atu' nbkis kwara' naha' lma, sawn kasa lga, mkayal lawziy qu nnbkis na 'tayal maha, twanay ta' lawzi musa' smbu' wagi' maha mkayal, ru bzyagan naha' sa giway lawkah balay hi' na cyugal mrkyas musa' lawziy, aw' lga, taqu cyugal hi' qani ga, siy ptbuci' mpanga' qutux laqi' yabut musa' ma, ru taqu wayal qasa mga, yasa siy aras yutak niqun naha' tqtuqiy, ru bilan naha' pbuling syaw tuqiy kwara' qu qpuri' na yutak, gi aki' hmbku' ru kuna yasa la nniqun naha' iy mbzinah mwah babaw niya' maha lmnglung. sawn kasa lga, ini' baqiy llpgan maha pira' kawas pinhknyan naha' la, ru siy shnga' kin nbkis lqu minpanga' sa 'laqi' ka cyugal hi' qasa, ru wal mhuqil kwara' naha' la, nanu' yaqu pnanga' naha' ka 'laqi' qasa qu smzyunaw sa mrkyas qasa musa' smbu' wagi' la. ini' baqiy sa pira' qawas lawziy pinhkngan naha' lga, siy kta tayhuk balay squ syaw balay na rhzyal ka tayax nanak ru ms'ubah qu rhzyal qasa, yaniy balay qu sawn yaba' ta' maha musa mhtuw sqani qu wagi' lma. ru 'nblayqun naha' kmagaw qu qqbzyangan naha', ru mhngaw cikay yaqu nnaga' naha' hhtuw na wagi' qasa lma. ktan balay min'aring mhtuw qu wagi' qasa lmga, nyuw balay siysyax rawziq snyaxan niya' ma, ru siy naha' lpnganiy sa kska' balay rqyas na wagi' qu playluq niya, ru siy naha' balay pshbyaciy mucing qhzyang naha' qu bhuniq naha', ru sat! sawn naha' malax qu lilang na pnayluq, wal maha satx~! qu pnayluq, ruw bsyaq hazi' lmga, siy kta' ka paws~! cyux maha psbka' lqu wagi' qasa lma, taqu kay' qasa lga, wal siy kktalax kwara' qu babaw kayal ma, ini' ptkaykwa' mgyay qu saxa ka smnbu' sa wagi' qasa mruw, wal siy 'pxiy 'mumuk na ramu' na wagi' qu saxa' qasa hya' lma, ga rima' wal tkmu' sa snasaw naha' ka hinngawan naha' qu rrusa' hya' lma, nanu' laha' nanak qu wal thuzyay mbzinah squ qalang naha' lma. taqu kay' maha rmnpus qu ramu' na wagi' qasa lmga, kya qu wal niya' 'mukan lga, wal maymaw mtalah rngu' smuling kinmkilux na ramu' na wagi' qasa ma, nanu' qu wal mkrpus babaw kayal hya' lmga, yasa qu nyuw ta' ktan ka bbzngah qasa lma, nanu' qu wal bun ka wagi' qasa lmga, aring kya ini' ksyax pinsyax niya' lru, yasa qu wal m'byacing ka nyux ta' ktan misuw qani la. nanu' aring kya qu maki' lqu qlyan squ gbyan qani lru, blaq kwara' uzi pinbahuw na squliq babaw rhzyal qani lma. nanu' mwah qalang lqu rrusa' ka mnwah smbu' wagi' qasa lmga, nyuw siy 'n'atu' hmawku' ru plquy' kwara' saaynunux naha' lma.
S.PHON: waɣiʔ qanij ħjaʔ ɣa laluʔ na ʦ~ʨjux makuʔ kja βaβaw na kajal, nanuʔ jas~ɕa qu mutuw ms~ɕajs~ɕjuw mħtuw βaβaw kajal mwaħ ps~ɕjax itaʔ s~ɕquliq βaβaw rħzjal qanij. nmaʔ iniʔ kzjan na waɣiʔ kin mkilux ru kins~ɕmjax ɣa, kja qutux pintkajkajʔ na kinβkajs~ɕan s~ɕraral. s~ɕraral s~ɕraral βalaj mɣa, mins~ɕaziŋ qu waɣiʔ nijaʔ ħma, jalaw ɣi s~ɕaziŋ qu waɣiʔ nijaʔ ru jas~ɕa s~ɕij ps~ɕajs~ɕjuw mħtuw βaβaw kajal mru, jas~ɕa s~ɕij kqljan krajrjax , ru jas~ɕa s~ɕij kkilux krajrjax qu kajal nijaʔ ma, majmaw iniʔ βqβaqij na s~ɕquliq maħa qajnuʔ qu ħħŋawan mʔaβiʔ na s~ɕquliq, ru qajnuʔ qu pptzjuwaɣan, jalaw ɣi jas~ɕa s~ɕij kkilux krajrjax ru ana kwaraʔ qqħuniq uzij lɣa, wal s~ɕij ʔŋajɣjut mkzjajʔ lru ana ka tnuβux naħaʔ uzij lɣa, iniʔ ɣβkuʔ uzij la. nanuʔ jas~ɕa qu mkajal kwaraʔ qu nnβkos~ɕ maħa, akiʔ ħms~ɕwaʔ twanaj taʔ s~ɕa mtlajlawkaħ na mrkjas~ɕ mus~ɕaʔ s~ɕmβuʔ na pnajluq, kuna jas~ɕa la βlaq ʦ~ʨikaj! nanuʔ s~ɕwazjaw naħaʔ s~ɕa ʦ~ʨjuɣal mtlajlawkaħ na mrkjas~ɕ mus~ɕaʔ s~ɕmβuʔ s~ɕqu waɣiʔ qas~ɕa. nanuʔ wajal βalaj qu ʦ~ʨjuɣal ħiʔ qas~ɕa, ruw kiʔa βalaj piraʔ kinβs~ɕjaq ʔnus~ɕaʔ naħaʔ lɣa, nja mβzinaħ qalaŋ lawzi lma, ana ɣa taqu ʔnjal qas~ɕa lmɣa, njuw s~ɕij ʔnʔatuʔ nβkis~ɕ kwaraʔ naħaʔ lma, s~ɕawn kas~ɕa lɣa, mkajal lawzij qu nnβkis~ɕ na ʔtajal maħa, twanaj taʔ lawzi mus~ɕaʔ s~ɕmβuʔ waɣiʔ maħa mkajal, ru βzjaɣan naħaʔ s~ɕa ɣiwaj lawkaħ βalaj ħiʔ na ʦ~ʨjuɣal mrkjas~ɕ mus~ɕaʔ lawzij, awʔ lɣa, taqu ʦ~ʨjuɣal ħiʔ qani ɣa, s~ɕij ptβuʦ~ʨiʔ mpaŋaʔ qutux laqiʔ jaβut mus~ɕaʔ ma, ru taqu wajal qas~ɕa mɣa, jas~ɕa s~ɕij aras~ɕ jutak niqun naħaʔ tqtuqij, ru βilan naħaʔ pβuliŋ s~ɕjaw tuqij kwaraʔ qu qpuriʔ na jutak, ɣi akiʔ ħmβkuʔ ru kuna jas~ɕa la nniqun naħaʔ ij mβzinaħ mwaħ βaβaw nijaʔ maħa lmŋluŋ. s~ɕawn kas~ɕa lɣa, iniʔ βaqij llpɣan maħa piraʔ kawas~ɕ pinħknjan naħaʔ la, ru s~ɕij s~ɕħŋaʔ kin nβkis~ɕ lqu minpaŋaʔ s~ɕa ʔlaqiʔ ka ʦ~ʨjuɣal ħiʔ qas~ɕa, ru wal mħuqil kwaraʔ naħaʔ la, nanuʔ jaqu pnaŋaʔ naħaʔ ka ʔlaqiʔ qas~ɕa qu s~ɕmzjunaw s~ɕa mrkjas~ɕ qas~ɕa mus~ɕaʔ s~ɕmβuʔ waɣiʔ la. iniʔ βaqij s~ɕa piraʔ qawas~ɕ lawzij pinħkŋan naħaʔ lɣa, s~ɕij kta tajħuk βalaj s~ɕqu s~ɕjaw βalaj na rħzjal ka tajax nanak ru ms~ɕʔuβaħ qu rħzjal qas~ɕa, janij βalaj qu s~ɕawn jaβaʔ taʔ maħa mus~ɕa mħtuw s~ɕqani qu waɣiʔ lma. ru ʔnβlajqun naħaʔ kmaɣaw qu qqβzjaŋan naħaʔ, ru mħŋaw ʦ~ʨikaj jaqu nnaɣaʔ naħaʔ ħħtuw na waɣiʔ qas~ɕa lma. ktan βalaj minʔariŋ mħtuw qu waɣiʔ qas~ɕa lmɣa, njuw βalaj s~ɕijs~ɕjax rawziq s~ɕnjaxan nijaʔ ma, ru s~ɕij naħaʔ lpŋanij s~ɕa ks~ɕkaʔ βalaj rqjas~ɕ na waɣiʔ qu plajluq nija, ru s~ɕij naħaʔ βalaj ps~ɕħβjaʦ~ʨij muʦ~ʨiŋ qħzjaŋ naħaʔ qu βħuniq naħaʔ, ru s~ɕat! s~ɕawn naħaʔ malax qu lilaŋ na pnajluq, wal maħa s~ɕatx~! qu pnajluq, ruw βs~ɕjaq ħaziʔ lmɣa, s~ɕij ktaʔ ka paws~ɕ~! ʦ~ʨjux maħa ps~ɕβkaʔ lqu waɣiʔ qas~ɕa lma, taqu kajʔ qas~ɕa lɣa, wal s~ɕij kktalax kwaraʔ qu βaβaw kajal ma, iniʔ ptkajkwaʔ mɣjaj qu s~ɕaxa ka s~ɕmnβuʔ s~ɕa waɣiʔ qas~ɕa mruw, wal s~ɕij ʔpxij ʔmumuk na ramuʔ na waɣiʔ qu s~ɕaxaʔ qas~ɕa ħjaʔ lma, ɣa rimaʔ wal tkmuʔ s~ɕa s~ɕnas~ɕaw naħaʔ ka ħinŋawan naħaʔ qu rrus~ɕaʔ ħjaʔ lma, nanuʔ laħaʔ nanak qu wal tħuzjaj mβzinaħ s~ɕqu qalaŋ naħaʔ lma. taqu kajʔ maħa rmnpus~ɕ qu ramuʔ na waɣiʔ qas~ɕa lmɣa, kja qu wal nijaʔ ʔmukan lɣa, wal majmaw mtalaħ rŋuʔ s~ɕmuliŋ kinmkilux na ramuʔ na waɣiʔ qas~ɕa ma, nanuʔ qu wal mkrpus~ɕ βaβaw kajal ħjaʔ lmɣa, jas~ɕa qu njuw taʔ ktan ka ββzŋaħ qas~ɕa lma, nanuʔ qu wal βun ka waɣiʔ qas~ɕa lmɣa, ariŋ kja iniʔ ks~ɕjax pins~ɕjax nijaʔ lru, jas~ɕa qu wal mʔβjaʦ~ʨiŋ ka njux taʔ ktan mis~ɕuw qani la. nanuʔ ariŋ kja qu makiʔ lqu qljan s~ɕqu ɣβjan qani lru, βlaq kwaraʔ uzi pinβaħuw na s~ɕquliq βaβaw rħzjal qani lma. nanuʔ mwaħ qalaŋ lqu rrus~ɕaʔ ka mnwaħ s~ɕmβuʔ waɣiʔ qas~ɕa lmɣa, njuw s~ɕij ʔnʔatuʔ ħmawkuʔ ru plqujʔ kwaraʔ s~ɕaajnunux naħaʔ lma.
S.FORM: wagi' qaniy hya' ga lalu' na cyux maku' kya babaw na kayal, nanu' yasa qu mutuw msaysyuw mhtuw babaw kayal mwah psyax ita' squliq babaw rhzyal qaniy. nma' ini' kzyan na wagi' kin mkilux ru kinsmyax ga, kya qutux pintkaykay' na kinbkaysan sraral. sraral sraral balay mga, minsazing qu wagi' niya' hma, yalaw gi sazing qu wagi' niya' ru yasa siy psaysyuw mhtuw babaw kayal mru, yasa siy kqlyan krayryax , ru yasa siy kkilux krayryax qu kayal niya' ma, maymaw ini' bqbaqiy na squliq maha qaynu' qu hhngawan m'abi' na squliq, ru qaynu' qu pptzyuwagan, yalaw gi yasa siy kkilux krayryax ru ana kwara' qqhuniq uziy lga, wal siy 'ngaygyut mkzyay' lru ana ka tnubux naha' uziy lga, ini' gbku' uziy la. nanu' yasa qu mkayal kwara' qu nnbkos maha, aki' hmswa' twanay ta' sa mtlaylawkah na mrkyas musa' smbu' na pnayluq, kuna yasa la blaq cikay! nanu' swazyaw naha' sa cyugal mtlaylawkah na mrkyas musa' smbu' squ wagi' qasa. nanu' wayal balay qu cyugal hi' qasa, ruw ki'a balay pira' kinbsyaq 'nusa' naha' lga, nya mbzinah qalang lawzi lma, ana ga taqu 'nyal qasa lmga, nyuw siy 'n'atu' nbkis kwara' naha' lma, sawn kasa lga, mkayal lawziy qu nnbkis na 'tayal maha, twanay ta' lawzi musa' smbu' wagi' maha mkayal, ru bzyagan naha' sa giway lawkah balay hi' na cyugal mrkyas musa' lawziy, aw' lga, taqu cyugal hi' qani ga, siy ptbuci' mpanga' qutux laqi' yabut musa' ma, ru taqu wayal qasa mga, yasa siy aras yutak niqun naha' tqtuqiy, ru bilan naha' pbuling syaw tuqiy kwara' qu qpuri' na yutak, gi aki' hmbku' ru kuna yasa la nniqun naha' iy mbzinah mwah babaw niya' maha lmnglung. sawn kasa lga, ini' baqiy llpgan maha pira' kawas pinhknyan naha' la, ru siy shnga' kin nbkis lqu minpanga' sa 'laqi' ka cyugal hi' qasa, ru wal mhuqil kwara' naha' la, nanu' yaqu pnanga' naha' ka 'laqi' qasa qu smzyunaw sa mrkyas qasa musa' smbu' wagi' la. ini' baqiy sa pira' qawas lawziy pinhkngan naha' lga, siy kta tayhuk balay squ syaw balay na rhzyal ka tayax nanak ru ms'ubah qu rhzyal qasa, yaniy balay qu sawn yaba' ta' maha musa mhtuw sqani qu wagi' lma. ru 'nblayqun naha' kmagaw qu qqbzyangan naha', ru mhngaw cikay yaqu nnaga' naha' hhtuw na wagi' qasa lma. ktan balay min'aring mhtuw qu wagi' qasa lmga, nyuw balay siysyax rawziq snyaxan niya' ma, ru siy naha' lpnganiy sa kska' balay rqyas na wagi' qu playluq niya, ru siy naha' balay pshbyaciy mucing qhzyang naha' qu bhuniq naha', ru sat! sawn naha' malax qu lilang na pnayluq, wal maha satx~! qu pnayluq, ruw bsyaq hazi' lmga, siy kta' ka paws~! cyux maha psbka' lqu wagi' qasa lma, taqu kay' qasa lga, wal siy kktalax kwara' qu babaw kayal ma, ini' ptkaykwa' mgyay qu saxa ka smnbu' sa wagi' qasa mruw, wal siy 'pxiy 'mumuk na ramu' na wagi' qu saxa' qasa hya' lma, ga rima' wal tkmu' sa snasaw naha' ka hinngawan naha' qu rrusa' hya' lma, nanu' laha' nanak qu wal thuzyay mbzinah squ qalang naha' lma. taqu kay' maha rmnpus qu ramu' na wagi' qasa lmga, kya qu wal niya' 'mukan lga, wal maymaw mtalah rngu' smuling kinmkilux na ramu' na wagi' qasa ma, nanu' qu wal mkrpus babaw kayal hya' lmga, yasa qu nyuw ta' ktan ka bbzngah qasa lma, nanu' qu wal bun ka wagi' qasa lmga, aring kya ini' ksyax pinsyax niya' lru, yasa qu wal m'byacing ka nyux ta' ktan misuw qani la. nanu' aring kya qu maki' lqu qlyan squ gbyan qani lru, blaq kwara' uzi pinbahuw na squliq babaw rhzyal qani lma. nanu' mwah qalang lqu rrusa' ka mnwah smbu' wagi' qasa lmga, nyuw siy 'n'atu' hmawku' ru plquy' kwara' saaynunux naha' lma.
S.PHON: waɣiʔ qanij ħjaʔ ɣa laluʔ na ʦ~ʨjux makuʔ kja βaβaw na kajal, nanuʔ jas~ɕa qu mutuw ms~ɕajs~ɕjuw mħtuw βaβaw kajal mwaħ ps~ɕjax itaʔ s~ɕquliq βaβaw rħzjal qanij. nmaʔ iniʔ kzjan na waɣiʔ kin mkilux ru kins~ɕmjax ɣa, kja qutux pintkajkajʔ na kinβkajs~ɕan s~ɕraral. s~ɕraral s~ɕraral βalaj mɣa, mins~ɕaziŋ qu waɣiʔ nijaʔ ħma, jalaw ɣi s~ɕaziŋ qu waɣiʔ nijaʔ ru jas~ɕa s~ɕij ps~ɕajs~ɕjuw mħtuw βaβaw kajal mru, jas~ɕa s~ɕij kqljan krajrjax , ru jas~ɕa s~ɕij kkilux krajrjax qu kajal nijaʔ ma, majmaw iniʔ βqβaqij na s~ɕquliq maħa qajnuʔ qu ħħŋawan mʔaβiʔ na s~ɕquliq, ru qajnuʔ qu pptzjuwaɣan, jalaw ɣi jas~ɕa s~ɕij kkilux krajrjax ru ana kwaraʔ qqħuniq uzij lɣa, wal s~ɕij ʔŋajɣjut mkzjajʔ lru ana ka tnuβux naħaʔ uzij lɣa, iniʔ ɣβkuʔ uzij la. nanuʔ jas~ɕa qu mkajal kwaraʔ qu nnβkos~ɕ maħa, akiʔ ħms~ɕwaʔ twanaj taʔ s~ɕa mtlajlawkaħ na mrkjas~ɕ mus~ɕaʔ s~ɕmβuʔ na pnajluq, kuna jas~ɕa la βlaq ʦ~ʨikaj! nanuʔ s~ɕwazjaw naħaʔ s~ɕa ʦ~ʨjuɣal mtlajlawkaħ na mrkjas~ɕ mus~ɕaʔ s~ɕmβuʔ s~ɕqu waɣiʔ qas~ɕa. nanuʔ wajal βalaj qu ʦ~ʨjuɣal ħiʔ qas~ɕa, ruw kiʔa βalaj piraʔ kinβs~ɕjaq ʔnus~ɕaʔ naħaʔ lɣa, nja mβzinaħ qalaŋ lawzi lma, ana ɣa taqu ʔnjal qas~ɕa lmɣa, njuw s~ɕij ʔnʔatuʔ nβkis~ɕ kwaraʔ naħaʔ lma, s~ɕawn kas~ɕa lɣa, mkajal lawzij qu nnβkis~ɕ na ʔtajal maħa, twanaj taʔ lawzi mus~ɕaʔ s~ɕmβuʔ waɣiʔ maħa mkajal, ru βzjaɣan naħaʔ s~ɕa ɣiwaj lawkaħ βalaj ħiʔ na ʦ~ʨjuɣal mrkjas~ɕ mus~ɕaʔ lawzij, awʔ lɣa, taqu ʦ~ʨjuɣal ħiʔ qani ɣa, s~ɕij ptβuʦ~ʨiʔ mpaŋaʔ qutux laqiʔ jaβut mus~ɕaʔ ma, ru taqu wajal qas~ɕa mɣa, jas~ɕa s~ɕij aras~ɕ jutak niqun naħaʔ tqtuqij, ru βilan naħaʔ pβuliŋ s~ɕjaw tuqij kwaraʔ qu qpuriʔ na jutak, ɣi akiʔ ħmβkuʔ ru kuna jas~ɕa la nniqun naħaʔ ij mβzinaħ mwaħ βaβaw nijaʔ maħa lmŋluŋ. s~ɕawn kas~ɕa lɣa, iniʔ βaqij llpɣan maħa piraʔ kawas~ɕ pinħknjan naħaʔ la, ru s~ɕij s~ɕħŋaʔ kin nβkis~ɕ lqu minpaŋaʔ s~ɕa ʔlaqiʔ ka ʦ~ʨjuɣal ħiʔ qas~ɕa, ru wal mħuqil kwaraʔ naħaʔ la, nanuʔ jaqu pnaŋaʔ naħaʔ ka ʔlaqiʔ qas~ɕa qu s~ɕmzjunaw s~ɕa mrkjas~ɕ qas~ɕa mus~ɕaʔ s~ɕmβuʔ waɣiʔ la. iniʔ βaqij s~ɕa piraʔ qawas~ɕ lawzij pinħkŋan naħaʔ lɣa, s~ɕij kta tajħuk βalaj s~ɕqu s~ɕjaw βalaj na rħzjal ka tajax nanak ru ms~ɕʔuβaħ qu rħzjal qas~ɕa, janij βalaj qu s~ɕawn jaβaʔ taʔ maħa mus~ɕa mħtuw s~ɕqani qu waɣiʔ lma. ru ʔnβlajqun naħaʔ kmaɣaw qu qqβzjaŋan naħaʔ, ru mħŋaw ʦ~ʨikaj jaqu nnaɣaʔ naħaʔ ħħtuw na waɣiʔ qas~ɕa lma. ktan βalaj minʔariŋ mħtuw qu waɣiʔ qas~ɕa lmɣa, njuw βalaj s~ɕijs~ɕjax rawziq s~ɕnjaxan nijaʔ ma, ru s~ɕij naħaʔ lpŋanij s~ɕa ks~ɕkaʔ βalaj rqjas~ɕ na waɣiʔ qu plajluq nija, ru s~ɕij naħaʔ βalaj ps~ɕħβjaʦ~ʨij muʦ~ʨiŋ qħzjaŋ naħaʔ qu βħuniq naħaʔ, ru s~ɕat! s~ɕawn naħaʔ malax qu lilaŋ na pnajluq, wal maħa s~ɕatx~! qu pnajluq, ruw βs~ɕjaq ħaziʔ lmɣa, s~ɕij ktaʔ ka paws~ɕ~! ʦ~ʨjux maħa ps~ɕβkaʔ lqu waɣiʔ qas~ɕa lma, taqu kajʔ qas~ɕa lɣa, wal s~ɕij kktalax kwaraʔ qu βaβaw kajal ma, iniʔ ptkajkwaʔ mɣjaj qu s~ɕaxa ka s~ɕmnβuʔ s~ɕa waɣiʔ qas~ɕa mruw, wal s~ɕij ʔpxij ʔmumuk na ramuʔ na waɣiʔ qu s~ɕaxaʔ qas~ɕa ħjaʔ lma, ɣa rimaʔ wal tkmuʔ s~ɕa s~ɕnas~ɕaw naħaʔ ka ħinŋawan naħaʔ qu rrus~ɕaʔ ħjaʔ lma, nanuʔ laħaʔ nanak qu wal tħuzjaj mβzinaħ s~ɕqu qalaŋ naħaʔ lma. taqu kajʔ maħa rmnpus~ɕ qu ramuʔ na waɣiʔ qas~ɕa lmɣa, kja qu wal nijaʔ ʔmukan lɣa, wal majmaw mtalaħ rŋuʔ s~ɕmuliŋ kinmkilux na ramuʔ na waɣiʔ qas~ɕa ma, nanuʔ qu wal mkrpus~ɕ βaβaw kajal ħjaʔ lmɣa, jas~ɕa qu njuw taʔ ktan ka ββzŋaħ qas~ɕa lma, nanuʔ qu wal βun ka waɣiʔ qas~ɕa lmɣa, ariŋ kja iniʔ ks~ɕjax pins~ɕjax nijaʔ lru, jas~ɕa qu wal mʔβjaʦ~ʨiŋ ka njux taʔ ktan mis~ɕuw qani la. nanuʔ ariŋ kja qu makiʔ lqu qljan s~ɕqu ɣβjan qani lru, βlaq kwaraʔ uzi pinβaħuw na s~ɕquliq βaβaw rħzjal qani lma. nanuʔ mwaħ qalaŋ lqu rrus~ɕaʔ ka mnwaħ s~ɕmβuʔ waɣiʔ qas~ɕa lmɣa, njuw s~ɕij ʔnʔatuʔ ħmawkuʔ ru plqujʔ kwaraʔ s~ɕaajnunux naħaʔ lma.
